code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD spirit_sight[Spirit Sight] click spirit_sight callback " Spirit Sight

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: One scene
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Martial Arts: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

As mentioned previously, a basic part of Immaculate training is that of interacting with the spirit world. The first step in this training is to comprehend how to perceive the spirit world. This ability is gained as part of the basic training of a Dragon Path, whether the Exalt becomes an Immaculate during character creation or joins the Order later in life. Possessing it is a requirement for learning the Charms on the Dragon Path.
The practical upshot of this is that by spending a single mote of Essence, an Immaculate can perceive spirits and incorporeal beings. Normally invisible spiritualized beings become visible to the Spirit Walker. This power lasts for an entire scene — or until the Exalt consciously reattunes herself to the normal world. Reattuning to the normal world is a dice action.
Tuning in to the spirit world does tend to distract one from the concerns of the material one though. The Exalt invoking this ability suffers a +1 to the difficulty of any activity relating to the corporeal world while using Spirit Sight. " spirit_walking[Spirit Walking] spirit_sight --> spirit_walking click spirit_walking callback " Spirit Walking

Cost: 3 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Martial Arts: 3
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Spirit Sight

The Immaculates are widely known for their ability to interact with and combat spirits. By merely concentrating for a moment, a properly trained Dragon-blood can do more than just see the spirit world. She can "Spirit Walk," mystically attuning herself to the spirit world on a physical level. This Charm allows the Immaculates who know it to interact with spirits as if they were normal corporeal beings. Physical damage dealt by a Spirit Walker that would normally pass right through a spirit's immaterial form affects it as if the spirit were flesh and blood, as do the Charms and abilities of the Exalted. The Immaculate is still in the physical world, however, and has to deal with any physical limitations that may apply. Also, unless the Immaculate uses Spirit Sight, she cannot see dematerialized spirits. Spirit Walking puts the character truly in tune with both the spiritual world and the corporeal one. When Spirit Walking is used with Spirit Sight, the +1 penalty to difficulties for physical world action is negated. "
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为龙脉（Dragon Path）的修行体系绘制一个能力流程图。核心是两个关键Charm：首先是Spirit Sight——这是所有修行者的基础，让他们能够感知灵体世界；然后进阶到Spirit Walking，可以实际与灵体进行物理层面的互动。这两个能力之间存在明确的先后关系。
明白。我注意到Spirit Sight的描述中提到它是"basic training"的一部分，而且是学习Dragon Path上其他Charm的prerequisite。那Spirit Walking是否直接依赖于Spirit Sight？我需要确认这个依赖关系的具体性质。
是的，完全正确。Spirit Walking的prerequisite明确写着"Spirit Sight"——没有前者就无法学习后者。另外，当两个能力同时使用时，还有一个特殊的协同效果：Spirit Walking可以抵消Spirit Sight带来的物理世界行动难度惩罚。这个细节很重要。
好的，我已经把两个节点放好，并用箭头连接了它们，标注了prerequisite关系。关于资源消耗，我记录了Spirit Sight是5 motes、持续一整场scene；Spirit Walking是3 motes加1点Willpower。这两个的Duration都是One scene，这个我理解对吗？
对，但有个关键区别：Spirit Sight是Reflexive类型，可以即时发动；而Spirit Walking是Simple类型，需要集中精神才能启动。另外，Spirit Walking发动后，修行者虽然能与灵体如实体般交战，但她本人仍在物理世界，会受到物理限制——除非同时维持Spirit Sight，否则看不到非物质化的灵体。
清楚了。我注意到Spirit Walking的描述里有一句很形象的说明：伤害灵体时"as if the spirit were flesh and blood"，而修行者本人"still in the physical world"。这种双重世界的设定我需要在图示中体现吗，还是保持简洁的流程结构？
保持简洁即可，但请确保每个节点的详细信息完整。特别是Minimum Essence要求：Spirit Sight是2，Spirit Walking是3——这反映了修行深度的递进。还有，Spirit Sight的启动只需要1 mote来维持感知，虽然学习成本是5 motes。这个区分容易混淆，需要明确标注。
稍等，我检查一下之前的记录——我把Spirit Sight的启动成本理解错了。重新确认：学习这个Charm的成本是5 motes，但日常使用时只需花费1 mote来激活感知能力，对吗？另外，reattuning回正常世界是一个dice action，这个机制我也需要补充进去。
修正正确。还有一点：Spirit Sight激活期间，修行者在物理世界的所有行动难度+1，这是使用代价。但正如之前所说，如果同时启动Spirit Walking，这个惩罚就被抵消了——因为修行者真正与两个世界都调谐了。
所有信息已更新完成。流程图现在清晰展示了从Spirit Sight到Spirit Walking的修行路径，包含完整的资源消耗、持续时间、类型、最低属性要求以及prerequisite关系。两个Charm的详细描述也都附在节点上，包括那个关键的协同机制——同时使用可以消除物理世界行动惩罚。
